---
title: ''
description: ''
date: '2023-07-09'
categories: [analysis, crypto]
image: 'preview.png'
---

# Trades

## Total Volume

### Monthly Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2658402/4419143" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/cryptocurrency-exchange-volume-monthly/embed" title="Cryptocurrency Monthly Exchange Volume"></iframe>

### Daily Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662647/4425604" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/total-exchange-volume-daily/embed" title="Daily Exchange Volume (7DMA)"></iframe>

## ETH & BTC Volume

### Monthly Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662727/4425691" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/the-block-legitimate-volume-index-eth-only/embed" title="Ether Spot Trading Volume (in terms of ETH)"></iframe>

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662733/4425703" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/the-block-legitimate-volume-index-btc-only/embed" title="Bitcoin Spot Trading Volume (in terms of BTC)"></iframe>

### Daily Volume

<iframe src="https://dune.com/embeds/2662673/4425617" width="100%" height="400"></iframe>

<iframe width="100%" height="420" frameborder="0" src="https://embed.theblockcrypto.com/data/crypto-markets/spot/btc-and-eth-total-exchange-volume-7dma/embed" title="BTC and ETH Total Exchange Volume (7DMA)"></iframe>

# Liquidity
